Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level offering (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to equip students with technical and vocational skills in data analysis and programming for business decisions (Target 4.4).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course includes a module on 'Information security, privacy and ethics', which directly contributes to building accountable systems (Target 16.6) and protecting fundamental freedoms (Target 16.10).
